svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Water Resources Management</text>
  
  <!-- Water Sources -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Surface Water
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="60" y="120" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Groundwater
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="60" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Rainwater
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Treatment -->
  <rect x="200" y="120" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Treatment
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Distribution -->
  <rect x="340" y="120" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="390" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Distribution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows -->
  <path d="M160 80 L195 140" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M160 140 L195 140" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M160 200 L195 140" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M300 140 L335 140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrowheads -->
  <polygon points="195 140, 185 135, 185 145" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <polygon points="335 140, 345 135, 345 145" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- End Users -->
  <rect x="340" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="390" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Residential
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="340" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="390" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Agriculture
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Return Flow -->
  <path d="M440 140 L470 240 L60 240 L60 220" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="250" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Return Flow & Reuse
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
